title: &Session param requires callers to always hold a full Session — testing friction
description: Every method in methods.rs takes session: &Session to extract api_url and account_id. Session derives only Deserialize; there is no constructor. Test code must build Session via serde_json::from_value with a full fixture JSON, which is workable but friction-heavy. Any caller that wants to use a hardcoded api_url (e.g. for integration testing against a local server without a full session bootstrap) must fake a complete Session object. Consider whether account_id and api_url could instead be stored on JmapChatClient after fetch_session, reducing the per-call parameter burden and making the client self-contained for callers who call fetch_session once and then issue many method calls.
close_reason: Our chosen design: &Session per call is simpler than JmapSession wrapper. The test_session helper in tests covers the testing use case.
